content.en:
"This Void Origin Array is very good!"

Ye Tian directly obtained the inheritance of the Void Floating Origin Array.

After acquiring it, he comprehended this Void Origin Array and knew how to arrange it.

After that, he made a request to Wind Tooth Island for the construction of other precious materials for the Void Origin Circle.

Stormtooth Island will help him collect, but he will have to pay for it.

After a while.

Stormtooth helped him get all the materials he needed.

Subsequently.

He built the Void Origin Circle on Icy Rain Island.

Anyway, his high-grade Eternal Ancient Gold was sufficient, so it was easy to arrange such an Origin Array.

Soon.

The Void Origin Circle has been successfully constructed.

"This magic circle can last for five thousand primeval eras, and my comprehension of the origin of the land on the other side of eternity in such a void origin array should make the origin rules of the other side improve a lot!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the Void Origin Circle.

Ye Tian faced the origin of the land on the other side of eternity, and silently comprehended.

Time flies, and time passes one primeval epoch after another.

And his other side origin rules are slowly improving, and every time he improves, his strength can also improve a little.

Before you know it, five thousand primeval epochs have passed.

......

"Five thousand primeval epochs have passed, and my attainments in the Origin Rules of the other side have improved again!"

Ye Tian looked quite excited.

Subsequently, he came to the other side of the Origin Rules Tablet on Icy Rain Island, which was specially designed to test the Origin Rules of the Other Shore, and prepared to use this Otherside Rules Tablet to test his attainments of the Origin Rules of the Other Shore.

Originally.

When he first came here, he used this Peer Origin Rule Tablet to test his Origin Rule attainment, and only showed a number 1!

According to Wind Tooth Island, the number 1 represents a realm.

If it reaches 10, it means that the realm of the Origin Rules on the other side of his side has reached the realm of Yicheng.

However, every time the Origin Rule of the Other Shore increases by a number point, it is extremely difficult.

Now, Ye Tian had comprehended and cultivated five thousand primeval epochs in the Void Origin Array, but he didn't feel that he could raise the Origin Rules of the other side to the realm of Yicheng.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian manipulated the original rules of the other side and integrated them into the rules tablet of the other side.

Soon, a number appeared on it - 6!

This means that Ye Tian has already raised the realm of the Origin Rules on the other side to the six-point realm, although it has not reached the Yicheng realm, this is definitely a very high realm.

Many Origin Realm Geniuses have cultivated for a long time, and it is difficult for them to ascend to this realm!

And in the past five thousand primeval eras, although his other replica bodies were also cultivating and had improved a little, they were still far from reaching the extreme of the ninth bone transformation realm.

If the Nine Bone Transformation Realm wants to impact the Origin Realm, you must first raise your cultivation to the extreme of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, that is, continue to refine each golden bone on the other side, and temper it to the extreme level where it is impossible to continue refining.

In this way, this golden bone on the other side can be regarded as a quenching completion.

Wait until the three hundred and sixty-five golden bones on the other side have been tempered to the extreme realm, and then comprehend the origin rules of the other side, such a genius of the other side level can go to the origin realm.

Ye Tian estimated that if he wanted to impact the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor Realm, he was afraid that it would take 100,000 primeval epoch time, or even longer.

"If you want to break through quickly, you need to get more resources to refine the golden bones on the other side. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the following years, he spent most of his time refining the golden bones of the other side and comprehending the golden text and the black text of the other side, and spent much less time on other aspects.

He thought that the next years would be so peaceful, and he only needed to cultivate step by step.

However.

this day.

The Lord of the Ice and Rain informs him that something has happened in the past.

So, Ye Tian came to the palace of the Lord of Ice and Rain.

In addition to him, there were more than a dozen Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors here, all of whom were other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors on Ice Rain Island.

Ye Tian had seen them before, so he knew them, but he was just not familiar with them.

Seeing that all the members of Icy Rain Island were supposed to come, the Lord of Frost and Rain said, "This time I called you over because there was a big announcement. "

"Lord of Ice and Rain, what's wrong?"

Another Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor asked.

The Lord of Ice and Rain immediately said, "I just got the news that the Immortal Island Alliance has entered the realm, and we have captured a Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor and obtained a very important piece of information. They found the Origin Worm Mother in the Origin Black River, but let the Origin Worm Mother escape!"

"What, the mother of the origin worm !!!"

These Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were all shocked, and they were immediately excited.

"Lord of Ice and Rain, if we catch the Origin Worm Mother, we may be able to find its nest. It is rumored that the old nest of the mother of the origin worm has a special resource that helps us a lot. And the Origin Worm Mother Crystal's Origin Worm Mother Crystal can also help us improve the Origin Rules on the other side, which is a good thing!"

"The Origin Worm Mother can't let the Immortal Island Alliance catch them, they must be stopped. "

These Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were talking about the Origin Worm Mother here, but Ye Tian was very confused, he didn't understand the situation at all.

Soon after.

The Lord of Ice and Rain arranged for several Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors to search for the Origin Worm Mother.

After they left, Ye Tian asked, "Lord of Ice and Rain, what is the Immortal Island Alliance, and what is the Origin Worm Mother?"

The Lord of Ice and Rain patiently introduced: "The Immortal Island Alliance is a force of similar strength to our Wind Tooth Island, and its headquarters is also in the Origin Black River, but it is close to the northern part of the land of eternity. And our Wind Tooth Island and the Immortal Island Alliance have a big contradiction. Basically, we won't go to the territory of the Immortal Island Alliance, and the Immortal Island Alliance won't come to our territory. But this time, they crossed the line, and it should be for the origin of the worm mother. "

"As for the Origin Worm Mother, it is a special life in the Origin Black River, it is very rare, the Origin Worm Mother is not powerful, it is equivalent to the ordinary Origin Realm. However, the speed of the Origin Worm Mother in the Origin Black River is amazing, and it can also mobilize the power of the Origin Black River to intercept the enemy. Therefore, even if the strength far exceeds that of the Origin Worm Mother, it is difficult to hunt it down. "

"The value of the Origin Worm Mother lies in his Origin Worm Mother Crystal, which can help us understand the Origin Rules on the other side, any Origin Worm Mother Crystal is extremely precious, if it is sold in the middle of the country, it can be exchanged for countless resources. "

"Of course, the most precious thing is the Origin Worm Mother's Origin Nest, which is the real treasure land. And a Native Worm Hive can probably give birth to more than a hundred Origin Worm Mothers, but it takes time to slowly breed them. "
